MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT DREAM CENTER EDUCATION HOLDINGS, LLC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Notice having been giving, and good cause appearing on the face of the motion, the unopposed motion for leave to withdraw as counsel is granted.

Counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the appropriate judicial council form.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT DREAM CENTER EDUCATION HOLDINGS, LLC MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Frank E. Marchetti, Marchetti Law, (626) 676-6377, for Plaintiff.
Collin D. Cook, Esq., of Fisher & Phillips LLP, (415) 490-9000, for Defendant.

Counsel requesting to be relieved advises that service of the subject motion has been yet to be effectuated and requests a continuance. No objection to the preceding is presented. Upon consideration of counsel's request, the subject matter is taken off calendar. Counsel is advised that he may re-file the subject motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
